summary: Iteration 2 testing complete: backend RBAC (per-resource read/write/delete), /api/auth/permissions, multi-level approval chains with history + super_admin bypass, and xlsx/pdf exports all working. 18/18 new pytest cases pass + 35/35 iteration-1 regression pass. Frontend: After fixing critical undefined-reference bugs in DataTableShell.jsx (missing prop destructuring + missing imports) that were blocking EVERY data table page, all features verified: KPI drill-down navigation, approval review dialog opens with chain timeline + history, Clients export Excel/PDF buttons render, Inventory QR dialog renders QR code + Print button, Reports tile buttons (40) present, all 17 sidebar modules render without crash.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL (fixed by tester): Referenced `exportResource`, `canWrite`, `canDelete` as variables without destructuring them from props, plus missing imports for `downloadExport`, `FileSpreadsheet`, `FileText`. Caused `ReferenceError: exportResource is not defined` on EVERY page using DataTableShell (clients, vendors, employees, attendance, projects, inventory, purchase-orders, quotations, journal-entries/accounts, safety-reports, assets, payroll, vehicles, documents, approvals). React error boundary unmounted the table so rows, action buttons, QR buttons, Review buttons, export buttons, edit/delete buttons were ALL missing. Pages navigated but data tables were entirely blank.

action_items: Review tester fix to /app/frontend/src/components/DataTableShell.jsx — added missing imports (downloadExport, FileSpreadsheet, FileText) and prop destructuring (exportResource, canWrite=true, canDelete=true) with safe defaults. Verify defaults align with intended RBAC gating: ideally canWrite/canDelete should default to false and be passed explicitly from useResource() per resource. Currently the defaults of `true` mean if any caller forgets to pass them, write/delete buttons appear for everyone — not a regression vs iteration 1 but doesn't enforce RBAC visually for that path.

Confirm every page that renders DataTableShell now passes `exportResource`, `canWrite`, `canDelete` from useResource() so the export icons + edit/delete gating actually function per RBAC. Spot-checked Clients (export icons visible), but uniform coverage across all 15 modules should be verified by grep.

Optional: surface the underlying approval row status in /app/approvals so testers can quickly identify a 'pending' row to act on (after running full-flow approval tests, many seeded rows are now in terminal state).
critical_code_review_comments: DataTableShell.jsx was shipped with 5 undefined references and 3 missing imports — indicates the component change was authored but never even rendered locally. Recommend a lint-on-save / pre-commit ESLint rule for `no-undef` and `no-undef-init`.
Backend export endpoint uses sort('created_at', -1) on collections that may not all have created_at indexed — fine for current sample sizes but should add indexes for production.
approval_action endpoint allows super_admin bypass via approval_engine.apply_action — verified. role check on `step.role` is correct.
/api/auth/permissions correctly returns full map for super_admin and the gated map for other roles.
Iteration 2 added several files; server.py is still ~717 lines, approaching the 700 guideline. Future iterations should split CRUD factory, approvals, exports into separate routers.
test_credentials: admin@erp.com / Admin@123 (super_admin) confirmed. Test users created during runs: hr_<runtag>@test.com (hr_executive, password HrTest@123) and store_<runtag>@test.com (store_incharge, password StoreTest@123).
seed_data_creation: Tests created+deleted transient TEST_* approval rows. A few TEST_PO_APPR / TEST_APR_FLOW rows may remain if cleanup teardown didn't run. Also a few HR Test users remain in users collection (visible in Profile page screenshot). Safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: /api/auth/permissions, /api/approvals (chain+history), /api/approvals/{id}/action, /api/approvals-config/chains, /api/export/{resource}.{xlsx|pdf} all verified working. RBAC enforced via require_permission(perm, action). Frontend DataTableShell fix is minimal — main agent should review/refine. Note: backend approval tests advance/reject approvals as super_admin which leaves seeded rows in terminal state, so the approval detail dialog may not show approve/reject buttons for the topmost row after extensive test runs. To test the approve flow via UI, create a fresh approval (POST /api/approvals) before clicking Review.
rca of the issue: RCA of frontend blocker: /app/frontend/src/components/DataTableShell.jsx (iteration 2 change) introduced references to `exportResource`, `canWrite`, `canDelete`, `downloadExport`, `FileSpreadsheet`, `FileText` without adding them to (a) the component's destructured props signature or (b) the import block at the top of the file. At render time React evaluated `exportResource && (...)` and immediately threw `ReferenceError: exportResource is not defined`, which the error boundary swallowed and replaced the component subtree with an empty fallback — so every list view appeared as a blank table with no rows, no action buttons. Reproduction: log in as admin → visit /app/clients (or any module) → open DevTools → see PAGEERROR `exportResource is not defined` repeating. Fix applied: added `import { ... FileSpreadsheet, FileText } from 'lucide-react'` and `import { downloadExport } from '@/lib/exports'`, plus added `exportResource`, `canWrite = true`, `canDelete = true` to the destructured props. After fix: rows, action buttons, export icons, QR buttons, Review buttons all render correctly across every module. Verified end-to-end.
